name: conjureos-finance
description: Privacy-first personal finance app (Mint/Rocket Money clone) for ConjureOS. End-to-end encrypted; the server never sees your transactions.

categorizeTransactions.description: Run the AI categorizer over the user's transactions and sort each into a budget category. Optionally scope to a single month with a `month` param (e.g. "February", "Feb 2026", or "2026-02"); omit it to cover every month. Auto-applies high-confidence categories and flags the uncertain ones for review. Use for requests like 'do February's budget and categorize everything', 'categorize my recent transactions', or 'sort last month's spending'.

promptSuggestions: Do February's budget and categorize everything
How much did I spend on groceries this month?
